rootCause: Chip static-container base styles were moved to a more specific selector (nav .chip-container) while inversion styles stayed on generic selectors (.inverted), so inverted=true did not consistently win the cascade for static chips and nested process-card layouts.
resolution: Aligned Chip state selectors to matching specificity across links, buttons, and static containers; restored process-card/light-vs-nested contrast by passing inverted=true where required, keeping Start dark, and adding explicit regression tests for static, interactive, and nested process contrast behavior.
